message:
test(frankenterm-core): expand VT conformance fixtures + origin mode harness

Add 16 new conformance fixtures across 6 categories:
- Mode combinations: scroll_region_with_autowrap, irm_plus_lnm, decawm_off_in_scroll_region
- Cursor edge cases: cup_default_home, cup_large_clamp, cup_row_only
- Pending wrap: pending_wrap_cleared_by_move, pending_wrap_cleared_by_cup
- Save/restore: save_restore_with_scroll_region, save_restore_roundtrip
- Line edit: delete_then_insert, irm_with_full_row
- Scroll: newline_scrolls_at_bottom, delete_line_middle_of_region, reverse_index_at_region_top
- SGR attrs: sgr_bold_italic_verified, sgr_underline_strikethrough_verified, erase_preserves_nearby_attrs

Also integrate origin mode (DECOM) support in the conformance harness
(CursorRow, CursorPosition, SetScrollRegion, SaveCursor) and apply
cargo fmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "irm_with_full_row",
+  "description": "IRM insert mode inserting at col 0 shifts existing content right, rightmost chars pushed off edge",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b34684142431b5b485859",
+  "comment": "CSI 4 h (IRM on), print ABC at cols 0-2, CUP home, insert X at col 0 (shifts ABC right -> XABC), insert Y at col 1 (shifts ABC right -> XYABC, C at col 4); cursor at (0,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "X" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "Y" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "C" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
